description: Style NoteTip Topp sandals offer enhanced comfort and superior style. Brave the monsoon or beat the summer heat with this durable pair! This versatile sandals can be paired with just about anything - from denims to kurtas.Product DetailsBrown thong style upper with appliquesBrown curved footbed with applique workTough, thick outsole upraised at the heelMaterial and careSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
